name: Hawks Tail of Greenfield
about: Hawk's Tail of Greenfield is a public golf facility in Greenfield, Indiana, offering both on-course play and golf simulation technology. The venue, formerly known as Greenfield Country Club, provides a classic 18-hole layout with a par of 72, playable at 6,760 yards from the back tees. The clubhouse has been renovated to include a bar/snack bar and outdoor patio, complemented by two Forsight Falcon golf simulators. The facility caters to all skill levels and is available for events, tournaments, and private bookings. Membership packages are available for those who wish to make it their regular golfing home.
why_golfers_like_it: Two brand-new Forsight Falcon simulators with high-quality technology
Offers flexible, budget-friendly hourly rates for multiple players
Features a renovated clubhouse with bar/snack bar and patio for socializing
Hosts winter leagues, making it a year-round destination for golfers

food_and_drink.notes: On-site bar/snack bar available within the clubhouse
Full bar available in the clubhouse

simulator_hardware.notes: Two brand new, fully operational Foresight Falcon simulators installed on-site

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site bar/snack bar where food and drinks can be purchased.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Typically, 2 players can play 9 holes in one hour, so 18 holes would take approximately two hours for a group of two.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hawk's Tail offers a Junior Camp program and is generally a welcoming environment for families and young golfers.
